title: Parapolicial Negro: Apuntes para una prehistoria de la triple A
original_title: Parapolicial negro: Apuntes para una prehistoria de la triple A
overview: Documentary about the prehistory of the paramilitary organization Triple A, which operated in Argentina during the 1970s. The film becomes a dirty, violent, and over-the-top crime thriller that delves into the organization's formation and reflects on how Argentines tell their own stories.
